title: Redwood Expansion
description: Redwood Expansion - new biom in Minecraft.
body:
Contents of our mod
-----------------------------------------
At the top of the world, there will be a new biome called "Sequoia". There will be tall sequoia trees made of redwood. With the help of the new redwood, you will be able to create new blocks, hatches and doors. And from the leaves of this tree, you can create many common items from Minecraft. In addition to tall trees, you will also find strawberries and new plant species in the new biome.

Why should you install our mod?
-----------------------------------------
Our mod fully reproduces a real sequoia forest and adds atmosphere to the gameplay. In addition, the sequoia serves as a wonderful decoration for your buildings.

Notes:
-----------------------------------------
_All information about "Redwood" is taken from open sources._

_Also the mod conflicts with the resource pack: "Motschen's Better Leaves"_
